heading: Producer election

children.text: price loss coverage under on a covered commodity-by-covered-commodity basis; orsection 9016 of this title
agriculture risk coverage under .section 9017 of this title
county coverage applicable on a covered commodity-by-covered-commodity basis; or
individual coverage applicable to all of the covered commodities on the farm.

children.heading: Effect of failure to make unanimous election
children.label: c Effect of failure to make unanimous election

children.text: the Secretary shall not make any payments with respect to the farm for the 2014 crop year, the 2019 crop year, or the 2026 crop year, as applicable, under section 9016 or 9017 of this title; and

children.label: A
children.text: price loss coverage for all covered commodities on the farm for the 2015 through 2018 crop years;

children.label: B
children.text: the same coverage for each covered commodity on the farm for the 2020 through 2023 crop years as was applicable for the 2015 through 2018 crop years; and

children.label: C
children.text: the same coverage for each covered commodity on the farm for the 2027 through 2031 crop years as was applicable for the 2025 crop year.

children.heading: Effect of selection of county coverage
children.label: d Effect of selection of county coverage
children.text: If all the producers on a farm select county coverage for a covered commodity under subsection (b)(1), the Secretary may not make price loss coverage payments under to the producers on the farm with respect to that covered commodity.section 9016 of this title

children.heading: Effect of selection of individual coverage
children.label: e Effect of selection of individual coverage

children.text: in which the producer has an interest; and
for which individual coverage has been selected.

children.heading: Prohibition on reconstitution
children.label: f Prohibition on reconstitution
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that producers on a farm do not reconstitute the farm to void or change an election or selection made under this section.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In the case of acres allocated to seed cotton on a farm, for the 2018 crop year, all of the producers on the farm shall be given the opportunity to make a new 1-time election under subsection (a) to reflect the designation of seed cotton as a covered commodity for that crop year under .section 9011(6)(B) of this title

children.heading: Effect of failure to make unanimous election
children.label: 2 Effect of failure to make unanimous election
children.text: If all the producers on a farm fail to make a unanimous election under paragraph (1), the producers on the farm shall be deemed to have elected price loss coverage under for acres allocated on the farm to seed cotton.section 9016 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: For the 2021 crop year and each crop year thereafter, all of the producers on a farm may change the election under subsection (a), subsection (c), or this subsection, as applicable, to price loss coverage or agriculture risk coverage, as applicable.

children.label: A
children.text: the crop year for which the election change is made; and

children.label: B
children.text: each crop year thereafter until another election change is made under that paragraph.

children.heading: Higher of price loss coverage payments and agriculture risk coverage payments
children.label: i Higher of price loss coverage payments and agriculture risk coverage payments
children.text: For the 2025 crop year, the Secretary shall, on a covered commodity-by-covered commodity basis, make the higher of price loss coverage payments under and agriculture risk coverage county coverage payments under to the producers on a farm for the payment acres for each covered commodity on the farm.section 9016 of this titlesection 9017 of this title
